prompt: A high-quality, photorealistic fashion portrait of a cute, minimalist young Filipina woman. She is sitting comfortably and relaxed with crossed legs on the floor of a clean studio with a soft pink background. She is wearing an oversized light blue hoodie, black shorts, white socks, and Nike shoes in light blue and black, flashing a soft, gentle smile. Behind her, a large, simple black-and-white line-art cartoon character with a round head and tiny eyes is embracing her, wrapping its arms around her shoulders and gently pinching her cheeks. The character is drawn in a hand-sketched style. Soft studio lighting, modern, playful, and heartwarming vibe, minimalist composition, soft shadows, sharp details, clean background, and natural facial expression.
